notes: v0.14.4 — Baked PNG textures for BOSS KEY (amber-copper hex keycard) and XP (lime hex shard with white chevrons), 256×256 cropped to match PULSE/SURGE. Wired everywhere keys/XP appear: profile dropdown wallet tile, match-result tiles ('+ PULSE / + XP / + KEYS' now show canonical icon next to label), first-clear rewards panel, profile sidebar. STATS — boss matches used to show PULSE twice (once as a stat cell, once as reward chip); dropped the duplicate text cell so the icon chip on the right is the single source of truth and the remaining stat cells (TIME / RANK / DIFF) auto-resize. Windows only.
